note: Pinned BEFORE any CONFIRMATION read (PLAN Phase 1 procedure). One headline config per surviving primary cell; no config selection on the confirmation window. committed_sha filled at commit time; the run script refuses to start while it is null.

fill_rules.headline: behind_you (MBO: first F on an order_id whose A at my price+side came after my placement)
fill_rules.lower_bound: trade_through (MBP-1: trade strictly through level) OR opposite-quote cross
fill_rules.upper_bound: visible_queue (replayed displayed queue ahead consumed; hidden depth not counted)
fill_rules.modify_events_excluded_from_behind_set: M keeps priority on size-down; including it would be optimistic

cells.extra: defend_sz_norm>=2 measured at first MBP-1 touch onset after placement (atlas definition)

exits.target: exit-side quote crosses target (long: bid>=target) or trade through — rule B15
exits.stop: fill at observed opposite quote at first crossing; stress ladder +1/+2/+4 ticks — rule B16
exits.time_stop: 30min after fill at prevailing opposite quote

lifecycle: place at first proximity trigger within session window and level validity; one fill max per level instance; cancel at session window end or valid_to; no re-arm after exit (v1)
decision_rule: pooled day-block p5 of headline-rule net EV across the 4 cells > 0 AND >=2 of 4 cells individually positive at p25; else Phase 1 verdict = adverse selection eats the atlas edge -> module NULL (holdout never read)
